step_rationale: Metabolizes clopidogrel to active inhibitor; mediates platelet P2Y12-receptor antagonism and thrombus prevention.
mechanism: CYP2C19 genetic variants regulate clopidogrel activation, modulating platelet aggregation inhibition and stent thrombosis risk after coronary intervention.

references.title: Emerging genomic applications in coronary artery disease.
Genetic determinants of on-clopidogrel high platelet reactivity.
Recent advances in the pharmacogenetics of clopidogrel.

Pharmacogenetics of Clopidogrel in Acute Coronary Syndromes
interventions: genetic tests for CYP2C19*2, CYP2C19*17 and ABCB1 3435
